content: هُوَّ رَكَن صَفّ ثانٍ وَ سَدّ الطَّريقَ عَلَى بَقِيَّةِ العَرَبِيَّات

transcriptions.arabizi: huwwa rakan saffathaeni wa sadd iltaree' Aala ba'ayit ilAarabiyaet

relationships: eng:he double parked and blocked the road for the rest of the cars
